items.title: Apple’s 24GB M5 MacBook Pro is up to $235 off its launch price, now at best price of the year
items.summary:
Update 4/17: The Space Black 24GB/1TB M5 MacBook Pro has just dropped in price on Amazon to $1,764 shipped. That’s $235 under the late 2025 launch price and $135 under the new MSRP after Apple upgraded the storage tiers last month. This is the best price of the year on this model. 

While some of the MacBook Pro deals we were featuring earlier this week have now jumped back up in price, you can land the silver M5 24GB/512GB model at the lowest price we have tracked in 2026.

items.title: Free up storage space and clean up your Mac with MacMagic for $26 (Reg. $100)
items.summary:
macOS is polished right up until it refuses to do something that feels like it should take one click. Hide or show hidden files? Annoying. Force-delete something that won’t budge? Also annoying. Merge PDFs, batch-convert images, clear out oversized caches, or restart Finder without digging around? Same story. MacMagic is down to $25.50 with code SAVE15 (reg. $99.99), and it’ll help put a lot of those little Mac headaches in one place.
